title: 7 Herbal Teas For Gerd
description: Zingiber officinale teas contains active constituents like gingerols and shogaols. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and carminative properties, which help to reduce inflammation and ease digestive discomfort. Gingerols also have a direct effect on the stomach muscles, slowing down digestion and reducing symptoms of acid reflux.
